autoDownloader.title: Auto Downloader
autoDownloader.description: Automatically download new episodes when they are released.
autoDownloader.disabledWarning: The auto downloader is currently disabled.
autoDownloader.errorOccurred: An error occurred, verify the fields.
autoDownloader.intervalChanged15Min: Interval changed to at least 15 minutes
autoDownloader.youMustSpecifyEpisode: You must specify at least one episode number

rules.description: Rules allow you to download new episodes on a schedule based on the parameters you set.
rules.removeNoLongerAiringDesc: This action will remove all rules for media that are no longer airing (finished). Are you sure you want to continue?
rules.notInLibrary: This anime is not in your library

queue.description: The queue shows items waiting to be downloaded or scanned.

profiles.description: Profiles allow you to define a set of filters that can be applied to your rules.
profiles.noProfiles: No profiles have been created yet.
profiles.deleteProfileDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the profile "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

ruleForm.noMediaFound: No media found in your library
ruleForm.mediaNotInLibrary: This media is not in your library
ruleForm.destinationHelp: Folder in your local library where files will be saved
ruleForm.title: Title
ruleForm.comparisonTitleHelp: Used for comparison purposes. When using 'Exact match', use a title that is likely to be used in a torrent name.
ruleForm.mostLikelyDesc: The torrent name will be parsed and examined using a matching algorithm
ruleForm.exactMatchDesc: The torrent name must contain the comparison title you set (case insensitive)
ruleForm.recentReleasesDesc: New episodes you haven't watched yet
ruleForm.selectDesc: Only specified episodes that are not in your library
ruleForm.episodeNumberOffsetHelp: For example, if the release group starts numbering at 13 instead of 1, set this to 12.
ruleForm.checkServerLogs: Check the server logs for more details.

batchRule.title: Create new rules
batchRule.description: Create multiple rules at once. Each rule will be created with the same parameters, except for the destination folder. By default, the episode type will be "Recent releases".

profileForm.globalHelp: Apply this profile to all rules automatically
profileForm.releaseGroupsHelp: List of release groups to look for. If empty, any release group will be accepted. Rules can override this.
profileForm.resolutionsHelp: Drag and drop to reorder. The first matching resolution will be chosen. Rules can override this.
profileForm.conditionsHelp: Add conditions to filter torrents or adjust their score.
profileForm.minimumScoreHelp: Torrents with a score below this will be rejected
profileForm.providersHelp: Select specific providers to search. If empty, the default provider will be used.
profileForm.delayHelp: Wait for better releases before downloading. The delay period will begin once the first match is found. If a profile with a higher delay is assigned to a rule or applied globally, this will be ignored.
profileForm.delayMinutesHelp: Wait this many minutes before downloading
profileForm.skipDelayScoreHelp: Skip the delay if the torrent score exceeds this value
profileForm.regexHelp: Comma-separated case-insensitive values or regex pattern

settings.debridNotConfiguredDesc: Debrid service is not enabled or configured. Enable it in settings.
settings.downloadImmediatelyHelp: If disabled, torrents will be added to the queue.
settings.intervalHelp: How often to look for new episodes.
settings.strictSeasonCheckHelp: If enabled, torrent titles and media must contain the same season number. This may lead to false negatives.

button.title: Auto Downloader
button.noRulesFound: No rules found for this anime.

autoDownloaderFields.releaseGroupsDesc: List of release groups to search for. If empty, any release group will be accepted.
autoDownloaderFields.resolutionsDesc: List of resolutions to search for. If empty, the highest resolution will be accepted.
autoDownloaderFields.additionalTermsDesc: All options must be included for the torrent to be accepted. Within each option, you can include comma-separated variations. (Case insensitive)
autoDownloaderFields.excludeTermsDesc: All options must be included for the torrent to be rejected. Torrents containing any of these terms will be rejected. (Case insensitive)
autoDownloaderFields.providersDesc: Select specific providers to search for. If empty, the default provider will be used.
autoDownloaderFields.profileDesc: Select a profile to apply shared filters. Local filters will override profile filters.

torrentList.failedToConnect: Failed to connect to torrent client. Check settings and make sure it is running.
torrentList.title: Active torrents
torrentList.description: See torrents currently being downloaded or seeded
torrentList.stopSeedingAllDesc: This action will cause seeding to stop for all completed torrents.

debrid.failedToConnect: Failed to connect to Debrid service. Check settings.
